title: binaria riedeliana
intro: Binaria riedeliana, also known as the Cape starfish flower, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Binaria riedeliana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an antiseptic. Binaria riedeliana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
